# German Rauhut

> Technical Product Owner & AI Product Builder aus Stuttgart. 10+ Jahre Mercedes-Benz Alumni, heute Freelance und Aufbau eigener AI-Produkte. Bilingual personal site (DE primary, EN at /en).

## About

German Rauhut is a Technical Product Owner and AI Product Builder based in Stuttgart, Germany. Bridge-builder between business and technology — 10+ years at Mercedes-Benz (tester to Business IT Consultant to Technical Product Owner), now freelance since 10/2025 and building own AI products through Neckarshore AI.

Diplom-Betriebswirt, Business Information Systems, DHBW Stuttgart (formerly BA Stuttgart, Fachrichtung Datenverarbeitung). 23 years of career before Mercedes-Benz across Germany, Switzerland, and Thailand — software development, consulting, operational leadership.

## Current Focus

- **Neckarshore AI** — own AI-product company. Flagship: OMNOPSIS Documentor (AI-powered documentation engine; 466 tests, 95 API endpoints, RBAC, monitoring stack).
- **Obsidian Vault Autopilot** — open-source plugin for automated knowledge management. Nearing public GitHub launch.
- **Multi-agent AI development process** — 12+ specialized AI agents (architecture, implementation, security, refactoring, marketing) with structured handoff protocol, parallel execution, automated quality assurance.

## Stack

NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis/BullMQ, Next.js, Claude Code (Opus), Docker, GitHub Actions, Vercel.

## Career Highlights

- 07/2015 – 10/2025: Mercedes-Benz AG & ecosystem — Tester → Business IT Consultant → Technical Product Owner. International, agile projects.
- 07/2014 – 06/2015: Senior PM Compliance at Targens, Stuttgart (AML application).
- 10/2011 – 06/2014: Business IT Consultant at Contargo AG, Basel (freight forwarding software 4ward).
- 06/2010 – 07/2013: Subproject Lead at Allianz AMOS (AML implementation).
- 04/2007 – 03/2010: Business IT Consultant at Regional Container Lines, Bangkok (ERP implementation).
- 07/1996 – 06/2000: Manager Software Development at SoftControl, Bangkok — founded and led the dev unit.
- 1992: Mandatory Military Service, German Air Force (Programmierzentrum der Luftwaffe für fliegende Waffensysteme, Welfen-Kaserne Landsberg).

Worked for: Mercedes-Benz, IBM, Deutsche Bank, Allianz, Gothaer, Contargo, Rhenus AG, Regional Container Lines, plenum, Targens, TestGilde.

## Core Competencies

- AI Product Development — multi-agent architectures, LLM integration, prompt engineering
- Technical Product Ownership — vision, backlog, delivery
- Full-Stack Engineering — NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker
- DevOps & CI/CD — GitHub Actions, Vercel, monitoring
- Requirements Management — concept to technical story
- Project Management — classic & agile, international teams
- Test Management — E2E, API, automation, test strategy
- Enterprise Consulting — ITSM, Release Mgmt, Change Mgmt

## Site Structure

- [Startseite DE](https://rauhut.com/): Profil, Projekte, Werdegang, Kontakt (deutsch, default)
- [English version](https://rauhut.com/en): Same content in English
- [Design Gallery](https://rauhut.com/designs): 28 UI design explorations (Art Déco, Vaporwave, SpaceX, Egypt, Brutalist, Gothic and more)
- [Impressum](https://rauhut.com/impressum): § 5 TMG (Anbieterkennzeichnung)

## Contact

- Website: https://rauhut.com
- Email: german@rauhut.com
- Location: Stuttgart, Germany
- Company: Neckarshore AI (https://neckarshore.ai)

## Site Technology

- Next.js 16 (App Router), Tailwind CSS 4, Vercel hosting
- Self-hosted Inter font (DSGVO-compliant, no Google Fonts CDN)
- Vercel Web Analytics (cookieless, no banner needed)
- Dark mode default, light mode toggle persisted in localStorage
- Lighthouse 100/100/100/100 desktop, 97/100/100/100 mobile
